programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: California police had several suspects in the robbery and brutal murder of an elderly couple. Ten years later, a determined forensic scientist used material from a dentist's office to uncover ballistic evidence that had been overlooked.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over and Out
programme.desc: When a pipe bomb rips through a rural home, police have no idea who is responsible. A 9-volt battery and the remnants of a mailing label ead investigators to the man who made the bomb.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1962, the small town residents of Hanford, California lost their sense of peace when one of their own, 15-year-old Marlene Miller, was murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The 1996 investigation into 48-year-old Martha Hansen's murder is helped by a legal requirement that bars have video cameras installed on the premises.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: At the scene of a vicious murder, the killer went to a great deal of effort to wipe away his fingerprints and obscure his shoe impressions left when he tracked blood trails on the floor.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In a 1992 murder case, the autopsy of a cremated body turns up telltale clues of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Past Lives
programme.desc: The body of a wealthy American businessman was found in his rental car. Teeth and bone fragments were the only remains. When the victim's wife files an insurance claim for $7 million, investigators seek the help of a renowned forensic anthropologist.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1981, New York correctional officer Donna Payant disappeared and was later found in a landfill. The medical examiner not only identified the cause of death, but also found an important clue.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Three seemingly unrelated deaths prove to be serial murders. The killer had been careful; he used poison which had no taste or odor. Fortunately for investigators, it also had a unique chemical signature.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1995, Palm Beach waitress Denise O'Neill is abducted and murdered. Her neighbor Luis Caballero arouses suspicions by behaving oddly toward TV crews covering the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Professional photographer Charles Rathbun claims model Linda Sobek died during a consensual sexual encounter gone wrong, but Sobek's corpse and digital imaging tell a more sinister story.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A Modesto, California teenager goes missing. With no signs of struggle in her home, police suspect she has simply run away — until her naked, bruised body is discovered in a ditch 20 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After a street fight takes the life of a national wrestling champion, police must determine if he was killed in cold blood or in self-defense.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: One morning in a deserted area outside of Phoenix, a motorcyclist discovers the body of a young woman. She had been beaten, bound, strangled and possibly raped. Nearby plants tell investigators more about the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman convicted of killing her mother in a car fire is granted a new trial. An expert witness has a different opinion as to how the fire started and, if proven, would clear the woman of any culpability.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A man riding a bicycle was fatally injured in what police believed to be a hit-and-run accident. Tiny clues found at the scene created a picture of the vehicle which struck him and led police to its driver.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1984, California firefighters battled ten arson fires in three weeks. When cigarettes and a scrap of paper connected the case to similar fires further north, the hunt was on for a dangerous pyromaniac.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2006, Nevada politician Kathy Augustine died mysteriously during a re-election campaign. The medical examiner could neither isolate the cause of death, nor explain the tiny puncture wounds discovered during the autopsy.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On October 15, 1985, two bomb explosions rocked Salt Lake City and resulted in two deaths. A third explosion occurred the next day; this time, the victim survived.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Several suspects and conflicting evidence complicated a brutal murder investigation. But the forensics were clear on one thing: the killer knew his victim, and that alone gave investigators a head start.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When two women went missing and were later found brutally murdered, police wondered if they were victims of a hate crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The murder of an eccentric millionaire was not entirely unexpected; he flaunted his wealth and cared little for personal security. The evidence at the crime seemed to indicate robbery, but investigators wondered if there was something more.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Firefighters find an entire family dead inside their home in an apparent murder-suicide, but there are several inconsistent clues in the rubble. Could ballistics, a time card and some secret audiotapes unravel the mystery?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1994, Rhoda Nathan was found murdered in a Cincinnati hotel room. When hotel employee Elwood Jones visited the emergency room with an infected hand, which he said was cut on a dumpster, the doctor recognized the injury as something else.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the search for the killer of two Texas teenagers, a behavioral profile led to suspect Jason Massey. Hard science proved the profile was correct, and Massey was executed by lethal injection on April 3, 2001.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2000, Christina Sanoubane was murdered in her Cedar Rapids apartment after moving away from her abusive boyfriend. There are clues at the scene: bloody footprints and DNA from the victim's rape kit.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police discovered the body of Douglas Beamish's estranged wife, authorities linked 20 cat hairs found on her jacket to a cat owned by Beamish's parents. It was the first time animal DNA was used to solve a criminal case.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force
programme.desc: The Power Ranges Time Force travel back in time to help the Power Rangers Wild Force, to prevent the three Mut-Orgs from joining forces with Master Org.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force
programme.desc: Cole learns the truth about his parents when Master Org reveals his sinister origin to the Wild Force Rangers.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force
programme.desc: Merrick must confront a demon from his past when Zen-Aku returns to claim his soul.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force
programme.desc: Cole must protect Kite, a young boy alone in the city, as Mandilok, the new Org General, discovers a taste for new buildings.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force
programme.desc: Princess Shayla and Merrick argue as the Flute Org's music ruins their song, causing the Rangers to dance uncontrollably.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force
programme.desc: While Max and Taylor help Kite look for his home, they are attacked by Jindrax and his brother Juggelo at an amusement park.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force
programme.desc: The Lion Tamer Org takes control of the Wild Zords and turns them against the Rangers.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Wild Force

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1996, un grupo de políticos extremistas robaron dos veces un banco en Spokane, Washington, con el uso de bombas caseras y la precisión militar para escapar.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Tenta-Culo celebra su aniversario y hace una gran fiesta donde invita a todos, desafortunadamente durante el evento sucede un crimen y nadie puede salir hasta encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego tiene un sueño de convertirse en policía. El Abuelo sufre un accidente en la regadera

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego busca desesperadamente una forma para recuperar su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo se hace adicto al videojuego de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Salubridad clausura el Tenta-Culo e Irma consigue trabajo como empleada domestica en el departamento de los Del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego lleva a Jonathan al museo de antropología por encargo de su escuela y se da cuenta que un personaje del Calendario Azteca se parece mucho a él.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se lanza como candidato a Presidente del Condominio. Sin embargo, un oponente inesperado eclipsa sus planes en plena campaña.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una borrachera, el Abuelo y el Noruego atropellan con su coche a Santa Claus justo antes de la Navidad. Para no dejar a los niños sin regalos, el Abuelo toma el lugar del accidentado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego suben de peso y Jonathan tiene problemas con un bully en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los Lambreton son los encargados de organizar la fiesta navideña de este año en su casa, mientras que Don Sebas extraña a su país natal y piensa en regresar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una oda al prototipo de familia mexicana disfuncional, con el humor y gran atributo para enfrentar cualquier situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín adquiere una nueva mascota que revolucionará el vecindario. En tanto el Noruego y Gaspar intentan ayudar a el Lentejas a superar sus extrañas inclinaciones sexuales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se de cuenta que el y el Noruego pueden ser padre e hijo. Pitipú es atropellado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se enamora de la estatua de cera de Ivanka Trump y toda la familia decide hacer un viaje y atravesar todo el país en auto hasta Nueva York.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Frustrado por su trabajo, Gaspar busca apoyo en el Abuelo y el Noruego y termina accidentado. Mientras, gracias a la medicina experimental, Peluzín se convierte en el Dr Lambretón.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia abre un grupo de WhatsApp para estar más conectados pero este se sale de control, mientras que Peluzín aprrovecha una noticia de un asesinato para sacarle dinero a Pitipú.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide recuperar a su antigua mascota tlacuache llamada Chofri, mientras que el Abuelo atraviesa por un lapso de demencia senil y depende de Gaspar salvarlo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una parodia de La Rosa de Guadalupe, el Abuelo es encarado por su familia para tratarse su adicción al sexo, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de Olaf para establecer un negocio ilícito en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar cansado de la ineficiencia y corrupción decide postularse como servidor público, mientras que Irma es grabada en una situación incómoda, convirtiéndose en una celebridad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Trouble is all but guaranteed when a crime boss and an arms merchant join hands. The two set their eyes on Goemen's sword, which can split a tank in half! After hiring Fujiko to steal it, they transform the sword into an invincible flying weapon of war.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Jigen and Gomen have sent a letter saying they are being held captive in a small but terrifying village. Lupin arrives in the village to rescue them, but Jigen and Goemon are acting oddly.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Don Kecchi, the wealthiest man in America, is terminally ill and has announced that he's donating his entire fortune to charity. However, Lupin steals Kecchi's money and shoots Fujiko right in front of Inspector Zenigata!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Margaret Tiffany, the owner of Tiffany's and a TV anchor, hires Lupin and his gang to rob her jewelry store on live TV. Initially, Lupin refuses, but ends up having to go through with it thanks to Fujiko's wild spending habits.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A princess of a small Silk Road country has been kidnapped. Lupin and his gang are persuaded to rescue Princess Yasmin in exchange for a stomach full of holy curry meant for the gods. However, the kidnapping was a trap to lure Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Here comes Beauty, the assassin hired by ICPO Headquarters to knock off Lupin! Overwhelmed by Beauty's powerful DumDum bullets, Lupin narrowly escapes with his life thanks to Jigen's quick thinking.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang head to the isolated country of Kimasan, after hearing the country possesses mountains of treasure. They sneak across the border but are quickly captured by Kinkaku and Ginkaku, the giants who rule the country.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Casino Paradise is an artificial island owned and operated by Domino, a casino tycoon. Domino decides to run for President and brags that with $500 million to spend, the only way he can lose is if Lupin steals his campaign funds!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Political fixer Pomade Jaws trusts no one, not even his wife Laura. He's stored the scandalous secrets of various world leaders inside a voice-activated safe.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin, Jigen and Goemon have turned themselves in to the FBI, but it's all part of the plan. Their real goal is to break out old man Clyde Barlow, who was once known as a genius bank robber, to get his help with their heist of the National Super Bank.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Isamu Kondo III, grandson of the leader of the Shinsengumi, hires Lupin and his gang to recover a golden cannon sunk by the Shogunate forces in the Tsugaru Strait. After much effort, the valuable golden cannon is finally recovered from the deep ocean.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Ellery Queen, the owner of the legendary sapphire called "The Eye of Solomon," is also the owner of a football team. Lupin, coming for the sapphire as announced, discovers Queen on the brink of death.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The 3rd Thieves Olympic is about to be held in Japan, and Lupin and Jigen are in it to win it! After winning the first and second Thieves Olympic, if they also win this year's getaway race, they'll become the first-ever Triple-Crown winners!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The world's largest diamond has been discovered in South Africa and Lupin has his eyes on the prize. But as it turns out, stealing it is the easy part!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko decides to marry Huffner for his jewelry collection, disregarding the rumor that Huffner's brides always die a mysterious death within a few weeks of their wedding. Turns out, he's also a collector of brides and likes them permanently preserved!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Jigen receives a letter from Sister Angelica and heads to the African country of Borodias. Sister Angelica wants Jigen's help to rescue Dr. Othello, the leader of the country's independence movement.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The ICPO tries a different approach to capturing Lupin: Astrology. It enlists the help of Marianne, a clairvoyant who can read Lupin's actions using astrological predictions and her crystal ball.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko calls Lupin from Professor Pot's lab, but since Lupin is half-asleep, Jigen takes the call instead. Fujiko claims Professor Pot has accidentally invented a robot that manufactures diamonds, but Jigen doesn't believe a word she says and hangs up.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko has invited Lupin and company to a classical concert conducted by Kyoransky from the International Philharmonic. After they get a good look at Kyoransky's baton, studded with a a diamond worth at least 200 million yen.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin goes to prison intent on making Silver tell what he did with the loot, only to discover that a new top-of-the-line prison was built over the site where he hid the money. Will the operation to trade an execution for the recovery of the money succeed?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is after the Golden Bell, symbol of the monarchy of Beltenberg and precious tourist attraction. However, the bell that sparkles in the belfry is just a brass replica.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Zenigata is taken hostage from ICPO headquarters. The terrorists demand to swap him with their boss Napoleon XI, but ICPO refuses. Since Zenigata is no further use to them, the terrorists are bound to kill him; but Lupin is to the rescue?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Smith Gang hit-man company was once the best in the business, but they're suffering now from tough competition. Though the company chairman Smith considers running TV ads to revive his business, he can't think of a good way to do it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Though Joe Spade was once a formidable hitman of renown and Jigen's sharpshooter coach, he now comes to beg for Jigen's help; he had gotten old, flubbed a hit contract, and is now on the run.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: ICPO Bureau Chief Jasmine is an able commissioner. She uses the governor to spur Zenigata into action, as she has a secret plan to arrest Lupin. But Jasmine's plan is to make this mission her very last at ICPO so she could get married.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Nightlight Mask murdered the Duke of Le Mond and stole his diamonds. ICPO is having trouble solving the case, so they induct mystery author Conan Dorill as a special inspector. Dorill deduces that the true identity of Nightlight Mask is Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: On a night of thunder and rain, a man gives Lupin a doll. The next day there is a news report that a diamond called the Phoenix's Tear had been stolen. Lupin's been caught on security cameras, but he has no recollection of having done the deed.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Las advertencias de Valentino se convierten en amenazas. A Alex le regalan un shot, pero en la cara. Llega un nuevo Ex y los celos llenan a la villa de problemas.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Valentino celebra el peor cumpleaños por culpa de la Sala Tornado. Desenmascaran a Queen quien saca su furia. Un Ex cae en una venganza tramada. Dos estrenan la Love Suite. Diana y Fershy arruinan la fiesta peleando y alguien debe partir de la villa.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Fershy decide quien se va, entre Beni y Alba. La Sala Tornado cocina una venganza que los hará tambalear a todos. Lilian explora con Alba y Bryan mientras que Asaf aprovecha con Valeria. En la nueva habitacion hay sorpresas inesperadas.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: El nuevo Ex sorprende entrando por la puerta trasera. Asaf arrastra su corazon por culpa de la indiferencia de Lilian, quien prueba los labios de Bryan y Alba. Ana va a la Love Suite y Aldo aprovecha para destrozar las camas. Un Ex llega acompañado.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Ana recibe a su fantasma más toxico y a Fraag lo "ghostean". El sexo de reconciliacion de Asaf y Lilian dura más que su proxima pelea. Valentino y Alex gritan su amor. Valeria se despide de la Villa. Diana y Chava son la pareja del momento.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Diana se asocia con sus dos amores. El deseo de Queen se cumple pero el precio a pagar por el es caro. Una Love Suite causa polemica. Asaf cae en la tentacion y Lilian elije a Bryan para vengarse. La Sala Tornado revela las mentiras de la Villa.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Yasmila y Asaf están en el ojo del huracán. Valeria aprovecha los estragos y se lleva a Aldo. Asaf y Lilian terminan de nuevo. Los sentimientos de Queen hacen que Ana explote y los de Diana hacen que Chava dude. El nuevo Ex llega interrumpiendo.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Llegan nuevos y peligrosos EX. Queen necesita una armadura para tanto golpe al corazon y Fano lucha por mantenerla cerca, mientras que Ana prefiere a Nina. Alex y Kevin se dan latigazos de desprecio en una fiesta en cueros.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: La Bebeshita busca a Queen para hablar, pero tambien para desgreñarla. En un barco pirata, Queen le promete amor a Fano mientras que en la Villa le espera un fantasma del pasado. Dos EX deben regresar al mar por culpa de la Sala Tornado.

programme.title: Catfish Colombia
programme.desc: Hace un año Diana conoció en una red social a Juan Manuel, sin embargo, nunca se han visto, ni han hablado por videollamadas. El día en el que se iban a conocer en persona, Juan Manuel tuvo un accidente de tránsito y perdió la vida.

programme.title: Catfish Colombia
programme.desc: Alejandra tiene una relación en línea hace tres años con Andrés David. Ambos viven en la misma ciudad pero hasta el día de hoy no se han conocido en persona ni por videollamadas.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega otro ex y causa una revolución en la villa. Ernesto le pide a Montse que sea sincera con él y lo respete. Dianey y Elías se van de cita y le rompen el corazón a Spencer, quien encuentra consuelo muy rápido en Norma.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega un nuevo ex y es alguien muy esperado, pero todo lo que ha ocurrido en las vacaciones impide la reconciliación. Spencer está decepcionado de Oscar y Norma tiene cruda moral. Renata ve con cariño a Elías y Sargento se pone celoso.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega un nuevo ex que causa celos. Renata llora por Sargento, y Rocío discute otra vez con Alejandro y sobrepasa sus límites. Hay una votación sorpresa y una decisión que deja a todos en shock. Ernesto quiere dar el siguiente paso con Montse.

programme.title: Matlock

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When Matlock’s neighbor, Les Calhoun, returns a malfunctioning used car he just bought, he becomes the prime suspect in the saleman's murder. Although circumstantial evidence points to a conviction, Matlock sets out to prove his new neighbor was framed.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When a British ambassador is accused by his lover, Shelby, of killing her husband, he refuses to hide behind diplomatic immunity and instead calls on Matlock to clear his name.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock must overcome his dislike of a caustic radio personality and defend him when he is accused of killing a rival disk jockey.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Convinced that his brother was framed for murder, a psychopath is determined to get even and holds Matlock’s associates hostage.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock takes the case of Ken Wilson, convicted of murdering his wife, whose body was never found. Recently released from prison after seven years, Wilson sets out to find his missing wife but gets arrested again.

programme.title: Matlock

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Elizabeth Ashley guest stars as a beautiful IMF agent who becomes the key to determining if enemy agent Nicholai Varsi is telling the truth when he claims he's defecting to the United States.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: George Maharis guest stars as John Bachman, an underworld figure with access to the syndicate's top secret computerized records who is convinced by the IMF that he has found the fountain of youth.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: William Windom guest stars as Paul Mitchell, a boxing promoter tied to a crime syndicate who becomes a target of the IMF when one of his fighters is killed before he can talk to the police.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: A breathtaking motorcycle chase over the hills of San Francisco figures prominently in the IMF's plan to recover three tons of the drug commonly known as speed from Sam Hibbing's illegal drug operation.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Dean Stockwell guest stars as Gunnar Malstrom, one of the leaders of Pendulum -- a secret terrorist organization -- who has a plan involving a major attack on the government that the Impossible Missions Force is assigned to uncover.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Ed Nelson guest stars as Van Cleve, a brilliant thief who is convinced by the IMF that he has the power of precognition as part of its plan to recover the more than five million dollars worth of art treasures that he has stolen.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Singer Barbara McNair guest stars as Jena Cole, the beautiful leader of a band of jewel thieves who falls in love with Barney who himself has infiltrated her operation to recover the stolen crown jewels of a foreign nation.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Cinnamon poses as a 50-year-old blind princess, heiress to a Balkan kingdom.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force is assigned to knock out a boxing syndicate which fixes fights to create favorable odds for a bookmaking operation, in the first half of a two-part story.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Barney poses as a fighter making his comeback, who boxes his way to a title bout with Staczek (Robert Phillips) in the second half of a two-part episode.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force, led by Jim Phelps (Peter Graves) enters Equatorial Africa to crush an army of mercenaries, led by a self-styled colonel, and to return plundered gold to its rightful owners.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Not knowing when, where, or how a dangerous adversary will strike, Jim Phelps and Cinnamon use themselves as human quarries.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: An army commander (played by guest star Theodore Bikel) plots to become dictator by imprisoning an influential cardinal and using a look-alike actor for a public endorsement.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force offers a "fountain of youth" to the vain and dictatorial widow (guest star Ruth Roman) of the late president of a small South American country in order to depose her.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a wooden toy airplane. Handyman Negri is working on a musical portrait of King Friday. Neighbor Aber provides his own tribute to King Friday as he mans his plane and draws a sky-written portrait of the King.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers introduces his television Neighbors to gymnast Chaney Umphrey when he visits at his gym and watches as he exercises. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, mischievous Lady Elaine Fairchilde reveals a mystery!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers reflects on a day when he went roller skating with his friend Stephen Lee. Mr. McFeely stops by with a film about how people make roller skates. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, the Trolley is still moving very quickly.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows pictures of the night and day skies. He plays with a star on a string and then remembers his trip to Moscow, where he met Russian children's television program producers. There is a pretend star falling from a string.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers explains why he changes into a sweater and sneakers, and shows how people make sweaters and sneakers. Miss Paulificate brings Prince Tuesday's ragdoll to life by dancing with him. The neighbors decide their roles in a play.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: The special 3-part musical story for children continues as Josephine and Hazel Elephant enroll at the School for Growing, where they meet a snake who can't hiss, an elephant with stripes, and a very shy giraffe.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a garage where electric cars are being made, and he takes one out for a drive. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Handyman Negri organizes a search for Prince Tuesday, and the unhappy Prince is finally found.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: H.J. Elephant recieves help from Mayor Maggie as he reads his first words. Mr. McFeely stops by with a film about how people make ball caps. Before he leaves, Mr. McFeely is allowed to take one of Mister Rogers' caps with him.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows how people make wooden rocking horses. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Mr. Aber gets a mask that makes him look like King Friday, and the Neighbors talk about the importance of making and keeping friends.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a television studio where the series Arthur is being animated. Mr. McFeely brings a video about how people make traffic signals. Arthur meets the puppets in the Neighborhood of Make-Believe.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers explains how a wheelchair lift works, and then shows one in action. He shows some of his puppets. Mayor Maggie and Neighbor Aber ride in a wheelchair until they have their checkups from Dr. Bill.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a daycare and sees children playing. He talks about why children need to go to day care sometimes. King Friday and Queen Sarah have to leave for a few days but Prince Tuesday does not want a babysitter.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: There's a new store in the Neighborhood -- it's Tony Chiroldes' shop where he sells books, toys and costumes. Tony has always been curious about what it would be like to travel in outer space, and he tries on an astronaut costume.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers talks about how some foods are better than others. Chef Brockett makes a tasty snack. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, King Friday discovers Old Goat eating from his garden. The King plants seeds everywhere.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits with Koko the gorilla, who has learned how to communicate in sign language. In Make-Believe, there's a gorilla, too, who seems scary until the neighbors get to know him. And there's a video of how people make play balls.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mr. McFeely has a strange package for Purple Panda which was left at the castle, a uniquely shaped orange ball with specific instructions that it is not to be opened. Ms. Ducey shares her adaptation of George Shannon's story, Lizard's Song.

programme.desc: Emotions are high in this intense story about a young girl allegedly being stalked by her molester. But when the results are read, the truth is not what it seemed.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Devon entró en coma y está conectado a un sistema de soporte vital. Antes de caer en coma, le dijo a su madre que su ex, Alisha, le dijo que no era el padre de su hijo. Alisha niega haber dicho esto y siente que toda su familia le ha dado la espalda.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Monique quiere probar que Chris la atacó cuando la llevó a casa después de una fiesta. Chris niega haber hecho algo malo y dice que Monique estaba demasiado borracha como para ser consciente de lo que pasó.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Kelsey dice que su marido la maltrata. Malcolm cree que Kelsey le ha sido infiel desde el principio y que sus dos hijos pueden ser de otro hombre. Además, el novio de Carrie, Chris, cree que su hijo es de su ex.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Curtis se sentó con su madre Telisha, y le dijo que está tratando de tener un bebé, pero Telisha se horrorizó y se preocupó porque Curtis apenas tiene 13 años. Curtis asegura que está listo para ser padre.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Russell quiere volver a reunir a su familia luego de que sus 3 hijos murieron en un incendio. Después, Tatiana cree que su sobrino de 2 años sufrió abusos. Además, acusa al ex-prometido de su hermana, Chris. Chris dice que no es un abusador.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Desmond cree que su ex, Cassandra, está inventando todo un cuento de que él ha tocado a su hijo porque está celosa de su nueva prometida. Después, Tammy ha sido investigada por abuso infantil e incluso acusada de encerrar a sus hijos en un armario.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Megan quería saber si su novio Devin era infiel. ¡Pero salieron a la luz secretos de relaciones aún peores! Además, te sorprenderá saber por qué Laura y Steven necesitan que Steve los ayude otra vez.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Stephanie dio a luz a un niño y cree que Brandon es el padre. Pero Brandon afirma que no supo del niño hasta tres años después y niega ser el padre. Stephanie y su mamá quieren que Brandon se haga cargo.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Deshawn afirma que su ex Lynette abandonó a su hijo de 5 años. Pero ella afirma que él la está alejando de su hijo. Sin embargo, Deshawn se enteró recientemente de que no está en el certificado de nacimiento de su hijo, ¡así que quiere una prueba de ADN!

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Thornton dice que no puede confiar en su novia infiel Crystal y quiere que se someta al detector de mentiras. Además, Stephanie quiere demostrarle a su marido, Mathew, que no está teniendo sexo con un miembro de su familia.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Stephanie dice que desde que llegó a casa del trabajo y encontró a su hijo de un año con un ojo morado, ha temido que la niñera de sus hijos los lastime. La niñera Cheryl niega las graves acusaciones acerca del niño.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: La relación de dos años de Anastasia y Robert terminó cuando él escuchó rumores de que ella le era infiel. Ella dice que siempre le ha sido fiel, pero Robert no le cree y ahora duda que sea el padre de su bebé recién nacido.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Aeshia ha venido a demostrar a Terrence y a su esposa Lashondra que Terrence es el padre de su hijo, pero Lashondra sabe que se equivoca. Tanto Shaunah como Chris se han convencido de que les son infieles. ¿Quién es el padre?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: ¡Kristy quiere que su madre, Donna, le devuelva su bebé! Donna afirma que se llevó al bebé porque nació con graves discapacidades debido a que Kristy consumió drogas durante el embarazo. ¿Quién está mintiendo?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his group continue their ascent towards Doflamingo's inner sanctum, but standing in their way is an executive of the family whose power is so strong moving past him seems impossible! Meanwhile, Cavendish learns the dark secrets of Dressrosa.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As Operation SOP finally gets underway but as Leo makes the dash to hide the Tatabasco grape in Sugar's fruit basket, Robin calls for an emergency stop to the plan! Meanwhile, Luffy, Violet, and Zoro are stalled by Pica whose sheer size overwhelms them.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Operation SOP is underway and nearing its final stage! But Trebol proves a far stronger guard for Sugar than was expected, so Robin hatches a plan to lure him away. But is there enough time to execute the plan before the ruse is discovered?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Tontattas are devastated by Trebol's furious attack, but as Usopp tries to convince Leo to abort the operation, Leo tells him about their commander Toy Soldier's stunning true identity! The Toy Soldier finally shakes off Lao G and gets moving again!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro continues his deadly duel with the nearly indestructible Pica! While the Toy Soldier narrowly escapes Lao G only to come face to face with Gladius! Luffy continues his mad dash to the top of the palace to face Doflamingo!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With the Tontattas beaten, Robin turned into a toy, and Luffy, Franky, and the others busy elsewhere, Usopp is the last hope for Operation SOP! But will he be able to muster the confidence and courage to face the terrible Trebol?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp runs into trouble in his battle with Treebol, and flashback sheds light on how a young Kyros made the shocking transition from murderer to one of King Riku's most trusted men.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: In the Royal Palace, Viola, Luffy, and the Toy Soldier have hidden themselves outside Doflamingo's chamber, only to have more enemies approach from behind, leaving them surrounded! Meanwhile, Franky is knocked out cold by the Navy.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Toys all across Dressrosa regain their human form, a flood of forgotten memories return, and Kyros launches a long overdue attack on the villainous tyrant Doflamingo!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Kyros finally taking down Doflamingo leaves Doflamingo's clan shocked! Meanwhile at the Colosseum, Rebecca gets her memories of her loving father Kyros back, and Sabo makes a move to end the championship battle by blowing up the whole ring!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy hurries to free Law, but with their pirate alliance dissolved, will Law still see Luffy as an ally? Meanwhile, Usopp has convinced his newfound followers to destroy the factory! Doflamingo's defeat has thrown Dressrosa into chaos.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The mystery of Doflamingo's return from the dead is revealed! But there isn't much time to ponder how it happened, as his plan to silence the country of Dressrosa unfolds, spelling doom for the Straw Hats!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the people of Dressrosa see their friends and loved ones slaughter each other under the manipulation of Doflamingo, memories of 10 years ago rush back, and the truth of that event becomes clear. Doflamingo announces the rules for his deadly game.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Doflamingo and Fujitora's agreement to not engage each other lasts for the moment - meaning all eyes are turned towards taking down the Straw Hats and claiming the rewards! And as Luffy starts heading to the Royal Palace, Fujitora stands in his way!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Robin, Usopp, the Tontattas and the others make moves to rejoin Luffy as Doflamingo's deadly game rages on! Meanwhile, Kin'emon makes it to the trash heap in his search for his friend Kanjuro - just as Pica emerges in the town.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With Luffy & the others recovering from Pica's attack, the game is afoot! Luffy has just enough time to regroup and set out to find Doflamingo, only to find that the dastardly Warlord has more enemies than he might realize! A strange argument breaks out.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Don Chin Jao and Elizabello successfully break Pica's giant arm but the rock giant is unfazed and starts throwing even more destructive punches at Luffy and his band of unwanted collaborators! Meanwhile, Navy Admiral Fujitora moves into action.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Moocy fast approach the showdown with Doflamingo - while the others with a beef against him continue to tag along. Meanwhile, Violet finds the key to Law's handcuffs, and Rebecca pledges to deliver it to him.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy makes headway toward Doflamingo's refuge, making his way through Doflamingo's guards, while down below Admiral Fujitora faces off against Sabo, who has the power of the Fire Fist from eating the Flare-Flare Fruit!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy cuts a lucky break as Kelly Funk shows him a shortcut to the Palace! But all may not be as it seems... Meanwhile, Franky and Zoro are locked in one-on-one duels, while Robin, Rebecca, and Bartolomeo enlist the help of the Tontattas.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Penned in at the bottom of a well, Luffy and Law are caught in a trap! But someone has come to save them who they least expect! Meanwhile, the Tontattas help Franky break in to the SMILE factory, and Bartolomeo resorts to tactics he used in the Colosseum.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Tontattas locate their captive comrades and seem to be able to get the message to them - the prison break is on! Meanwhile, heavy-hitters from the Colosseum turn from wringing each other's necks towards a unified plan.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Hidden far underground, Kin'emon finds his old friend Kanjuro whose powers allow the two to, quickly, but not elegantly, escape to the surface! Meanwhile, Cavendish shares his fears that the "Birdcage" game Doflamingo is playing has been rigged all along.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Tontattas are in full revolt! But can they keep their wits about them long enough to make it out? Meanwhile, Zoro finally gains the upper hand against Pica, and Franky finds a way to deal with Señor Pink.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Franky finally makes it into the factory and the Tontattas are reunited with their captive friends! But Princess Mansherry is nowhere to be found. Factory manager Kuween becomes irate when ignored and launches an attack on Franky.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Robin, Rebecca, and Bartolomeo draw closer to the Flower Field on the fourth level of the Royal Palace plateau, but a sudden attack by Gladius' exploding spheres sends Robin and Bartolomeo hurtling towards the level below.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Rebecca makes it to the Flower Field alone, but unfortunately finds company there that is less than friendly! Meanwhile, Bartolomeo pushes himself to the limit in order to help Luffy advance, but does he leave himself vulnerable in the process?

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan attempts to liberate a fleet of captured ships who aren't sure they want to be liberated. Their AIs fear new captains will enslave them.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Genites attack Tyr's wife and colony, and he discovers that he is a father - and his son may be the genetic reincarnation of Drago Mussevni.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: With 50 parties on board, Dylan hosts the signing of the New Commonwealth charter but soon discovers there are intruders intent on stopping the signing.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Beka and Tyr are taken over by the energy from a dimensional tunnel. Dylan, Trance, and Harper must save them before they destroy the ship.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan is framed for murder and must clear his name, all while finding the pieces of a vase said to grant the owner the "blessings of the cosmos."

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The crew rescues a group of refugees, only to discover they have been subject to government experiments and are extremely unstable.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Beka's Uncle Sid runs for office in the New Commonwealth, but an assassination attempt causes the crew to act as his security.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Destiny
programme.desc: When Johnny Smith's prediction of a tragic fire comes true, the incident brings him unwanted media coverage, as well as the attention of Greg Stillson, a very ambitious young candidate for congress.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Valley of the Shadow
programme.desc: The season premiere finds Johnny still shaken by his Armagedon visions and growing increasingly obsessed with Stillson whom he's secretly investigating.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Descent
programme.desc: Johnny struggles to rescue four teens trapped in a collapsing mine, all the while reliving - and in some way trying to redeem - sins from his family's past.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Ruby gives birth to a new form of evil and disguises herself to form a bond with Brandy. Kelly returns with a friend who is leading the search for The Prophesized One to defeat The Dark Ones, while Ash realizes evil is out to get his daughter.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Ruby reveals herself to Ash as she tries to strengthen her bond with Brandy to defeat The Prophesized One. Meanwhile, Pablo and Dalton continue to spar, unsure of one another.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Brock warns Ash of an otherworldly hurricane brewing. Ash and Pablo make a discovery at the hardware store. Kelly and Brandy face a familiar foe.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Ruby's house of horrors reveals her master plan as well as a little bundle of joy that terrorizes Ash. Pablo's Brujo ties bring him back to the path he needs to take to reveal his true destiny in the battle against evil.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Ash's bond with his daughter strengthens as more Knights of Sumeria join Pablo and him to defeat evil. Kelly decides to go after Ruby herself while Ash and team, along with the knights enter the rift and face a battle of their own.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Ruby's latest creation is her most diabolical plan yet to turn Brandy against her father. Pablo suspects something isn't quite right with Kelly when she meets him and Ash at the school. Chaos ensues when evil shows up at the school dance.

programme.title: The Disappearance Of: Natalee Holloway
programme.desc: Natalee Holloway disappears from Aruba in May 2005, and her father Dave never stops looking for her; he receives a new lead that could be the key to solving the 12-year-old mystery, but he has suspicions about the source.

programme.title: The Disappearance Of: Natalee Holloway
programme.desc: Dave Holloway and a team of investigators pursue a lead that may shed light on his daughter's disappearance, with the goal of obtaining a taped confession and concrete evidence.

programme.title: The Disappearance Of: Natalee Holloway
programme.desc: The sting operation in New Orleans continues as the investigation team begins running out of time to obtain the necessary information from the co-conspirator.

programme.title: The Disappearance Of: Natalee Holloway
programme.desc: TJ and his team head to Aruba to begin phase two of their investigation - attempting to obtain DNA evidence from Natalee's alleged burial site; Dave must convince his informant to go the extra mile.

programme.title: The Disappearance Of: Natalee Holloway
programme.desc: TJ races to the location where the co-conspirator claims he dug up Natalee's remains in 2010; working with the Aruban authorities, they search for DNA that could lead to convicting those involved in Natalee's disappearance.

programme.title: The Disappearance Of: Natalee Holloway
programme.desc: After two years following a lead, the investigators finally have evidence in hand that could answer the 12-year-old mystery of what happened to Natalee Holloway.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Phoenix Coldon
programme.desc: Phoenix Coldon vanishes; investigative reporter, Shawndrea Thomas, and retired deputy Police Chief Joe Delia attempt to unravel the mysterious unsolved case in the hope of finding justice for Phoenix.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Phoenix Coldon
programme.desc: Joe and Shawndrea follow up on a handful of Phoenix sightings since her disappearance and begin to question whether she'd been lured into a new life more dangerous than she could have anticipated; a surprising lead goes to an unexpected locale.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Susan Cox Powell
programme.desc: A young mother in Utah vanishes and the only suspect, her husband, acts suspiciously; Stephanie Bauer examines never-before-seen home video recordings that shed light on the dramatic events surrounding the disappearance of Susan Cox Powell.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A beloved member of the local community is brutally murdered with part of his body apparently taken as a souvenir by the killer; detectives try to make sense of this horrifying crime despite conflicting stories and a possible false confession.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After a divorced mother is found murdered in her home, police discover she had an unusual array of people involved in her life.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After an elderly woman comes into a large sum of money, she is attacked; investigators uncover a twisted tale of of addiction, brutality and betrayal.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After a missing woman is discovered by a deputy to be murdered in the backyard of her family home, investigators must learn whether the victim was killed by a mysterious driver seen lingering outside the house, or someone unexpected.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A U.S. Navy veteran is brutally beaten to death during a home robbery; to find the killer, police must sift through various lies as several suspects desperately attempt to cover their tracks.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When a schoolteacher is gunned down in public, a known felon's DNA and phone records link him to the crime; however, after investigators arrest the man, they discover the real killer might actually be someone else entirely.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Flight Status

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Discovering the frozen body of Merlin (guest star Matthew Walker), SG-1 works to help him build the Sangraal before Adria (guest star Morena Baccarin) and her Ori army can track them down. Starring Ben Browder, Amanda Tapping, and Michael Shanks.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: During an off-world mission in a village rocked by fierce tremors, Col. Samantha Carter, Dr. McKay, and Dr. Keller become trapped when they fall into a sinkhole. But every attempt to escape the confines of the chamber puts them in further jeopardy.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The IOA has entrusted Mr. Coolidge, with interviewing Teyla Emmagan and Ronan Dex about their suitability to continue with the Atlantis expedition. Unbeknownst to anyone, a plan by the Wraith to invade the Midway station is about to be initiated.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Teyla, more determined than ever to find the missing Athosians, convinces Sheppard to travel with her to a trading settlement in search for answers. What they find there leads them to startling discovery that no one could have anticipated.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: After an unforeseen return, Dr. Carson Beckett shares that he has been held captive. As Teyla is re-united with some missing fellow Athosians, she begins to formulate a plan to ensure their escape, if she is able to find them in time.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Disheartened by another unsuccessful search for Teyla, Lt. Colonel Sheppard returns to Atlantis and senses that something is not right—the city has been abandoned. Now, McKay sets out on a risky plan to reverse a future that went horribly wrong.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: As Sheppard and Ronon are trapped beneath a collapsed compound, McKay and Lorne are trapped in another pocket of debris. Michael’s flagship Wraith Cruiser hurtles towards the compound, while Carter leads a rescue mission. Who will reach them first?

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: When Dr. Keller fails to report for her shift, concerned team members are shocked to discover her unconscious in her quarters. With the situation on Atlantis escalating, Woolsey is ultimately faced with a decision that could cost Keller her life.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Piper, Phoebe and Paige come to the aid of Mylie, a Mermaid-turned-human, when she shows up looking for their help after a pact she made with an evil Sea Hag begins to go drastically wrong.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: An evil witch traps the Halliwell sisters in distorted versions of classic fairy tales, where Phoebe attends a ball as Cinderella, Paige has a taste of Snow White's poisoned apple, and Piper encounters a big, bad wolf, as Little Red Riding Hood.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Cole and Phoebe both fall under the spell of the Siren, who lures husbands to her and entrances their wives to follow with the intent to kill, leaving Piper and Paige to figure out how to save Phoebe.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: When a demon coerces a boy into turning him into an evil comic book villain so he can steal an Elder's powers, the boy transforms The Charmed Ones into comic book heroes with superhuman strengths to prevent this from happening.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: While seeking the advice of a fortune teller regarding her missing powers, Phoebe discovers in a premonition that a demon is going to kill them all after murdering the last one of the coven they were supposed to protect.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Barbas, the Demon of Fear, returns and tricks Paige into giving him Cole's powers, and plots revenge on the Halliwell sisters by playing them against their darkest fears.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: When Phoebe must constantly save the life of her new boyfriend, a warlock shows up from the future, claiming that future Cole sent him in order to kill the boyfriend before Phoebe dies instead.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Paige gets to know the whitelighter in her, when she meets her first charge, a man named Sam. Unbeknownst to her, Sam is actually her real father. Meanwhile, Cole rashly tries to get himself vanquished by the Charmed Ones.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Phoebe falls prey to Jeric, a demon in search of the perfect body to hold the spirit of Isis, his dead lover. To trap the spirit, Jeric mummifies Phoebe's body. Meanwhile, Cole tries to save Phoebe by making a deal with the demon.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: After kidnapping Phoebe, Cole sends a shapeshifter to assume Phoebe's identity to help him manipulate Piper and Paige into giving him ownership of the manor, allowing him access to the powerful Nexus located beneath the house.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: In his twisted attempt to win Phoebe's heart back, Cole casts a spell that alters reality, which eliminates Paige as a Halliwell and destroys the Power of Three.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Glen returns to Paige's life with a big surprise - he is about to get married to a girl called Jessica. Meanwhile, the sisters summon a Witch Doctor whom they want to dispatch all the evil remnants that surround the Manor.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: A demon attacks The Charmed Ones with dream dust, causing their nightmares to come to life. Paige is harassed by an evil clown at a baby shower, Piper has an affair and Phoebe is chased by a maniac with a chainsaw.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: After Piper is put on bed rest for high blood pressure, Phoebe and Paige discover that all magic has disappeared from the world.

programme.title: Survivor
programme.desc: It’s every castaway for themselves, as two tribes become one in this season’s merge. Meanwhile, one castaway’s thirst for power could earn them a spot on the jury, and jaws drop as the blindside streak continues.

programme.title: Survivor
programme.desc: The entire tribe embarks on the craziest idol hunt in the history of the game. Also, one castaway showcases their ninja-like skills to sabotage another.

programme.title: Survivor
programme.desc: One castaway’s paranoia could lead to a game-changing flip, and a grade-school memory challenge looks more like a college exam for several exhausted castaways.

programme.title: Survivor
programme.desc: Homesick castaways are granted a brief reprieve with letters from home. Meanwhile, one castaway secretly embarks on a stakeout to gather intel from the competition and another castaway falls hard while attempting to collect coconuts from the treetops.

programme.title: Survivor
programme.desc: One castaway’s bidding strategy at the Survivor auction could pay off for them. Meanwhile, castaways draw rocks for a huge advantage in the game, and another castaway decides to show off his idol in an attempt to ensure his safety.

programme.title: Survivor
programme.desc: During an intense challenge, castaways attempt to crack the code and earn a spot in the final five. Additionally, one castaway’s paranoia threatens another’s stake in the game, and Tony’s closest confidant is wooed by another alliance.

programme.title: Survivor
programme.desc: Castaways scale new heights as they battle for a guaranteed spot in the final four. Meanwhile, friends become enemies when one castaway overhears plans for her eviction, and Tony comes up with a strategy for his special Immunity idol

programme.title: Survivor
programme.desc: Eyeing a spot in the final three, one castaway pulls one of the greatest comebacks in Survivor history, and the final castaways face a bitter jury when pleading their case for the $1 million prize.

programme.title: Survivor
programme.desc: The Castaways are reunited for the first time to discuss their behaviors and motivations.

programme.title: Survivor
programme.desc: The "Blood vs. Water" theme returns as all-new castaways compete with - and ultimately against - their loved ones who share the same goal: to outwit, outplay, outlast and ultimately be crowned Sole Survivor and winner of the 1 million dollar prize.

programme.title: Survivor
programme.desc: After losing their flint, one tribe attempts to barter with Jeff in a rare negotiation. Meanwhile, former MLB player John Rocker's controversial past threatens his future in the game.

programme.title: Survivor

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Dr. Marvin P. Gunderson is summoned to examine Kitty Kat, the ailing lion pet of the Addams Family. Morticia decides that it is the doctor who needs help. To build his confidence, human members of the family pretend to be ill so he can effect cures.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's concern that Lurch is overworked leads Gomez to the operating table to assemble a custom-built secondary butler. Lurch lets the robot do all the work and then begins to feel that he isn't needed anymore.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Poisoners are the most devious of killers, relying on stealth or their victim's trust in order to steal their lives. They're the most dangerous creatures in the world: smart assassins. And they usually don't stop at one kill.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts and the procedures they use to solve murders and other mysteries in minutes or centuries after they happen.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When abduction turns to murder, forensic science is the only key to finding justice for the victims of a kidnapper's deadly intentions.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When teenagers are driven to kill, their victims are but the first to fall. In three such cases, the families of the killers, as well as their communities, become the victims of violent crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: There are several things that can suggest murder; jealousy, anger, poison…When everyday substances reveal hidden clues that break a homicide case, those substances become the elements of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes when a death seems to be accidental or the result of a tragic accident, it is up to forensic scientists to reveal the deception lying just below the surface.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When lovers turn on each other, or marriages fail, some ruthless spouses find a grisly way to gain an uncontested divorce – with no paperwork. When murder tears lovers apart, forensic science must put piece together the mystery to catch the killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Hairs and Fibers: The tiniest filament can become a mark of distinction in the most singular and intimate of ways. Investigators have come to rely on forensic evidence as fine as a carpet fiber or as innocent as an eyelash to crack difficult cases.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For some killers, murder can be a profitable business. And the scene of the crime can be both a source for clues, and puzzling questions. When a victim has been targeted for death, investigators must look beyond the obvious to uncover a murder for hire.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes killers are careful to leave no fingerprints behind. But methods of the murder itself can leave a lasting impression on police, especially when the tools (or weapons) of a killer's trade leave an innocent victim marked for death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Formed in the 1830s to protect settlers against Indian attack, the Rangers became part of the Texas Highway Patrol in 1935. Their role has continued to evolve to keep up with changing times; today it includes sophisticated forensics labs.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some of the best clues come from the least likely places. Baffling crimes have been solved and criminals betrayed through evidence provided by insects, beer bottles, and other seemingly meaningless objects.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Men don't have a monopoly on murder, but it's still extraordinary when women kill. Though female killers are as deadly as males, they choose less violent methods.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a murder is committed and deceit clouds the evidence, investigators turn to science and technology to uncover the truth and expose a murderous lie and capture the killer.
